=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/ ===
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Welcome to 
	AAAC 2026
Dear AAAC attendees,
2026 4th Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
				(AAAC)
will take 
				place
in Hongkong, China
from
August 
				21-23, 2026
,
where
participants will gain detailed insights into the state of the art of aerospace and astronautics, and enjoy the exchange with other enthusiasts from all over the world who are interested in this highly relevant and constantly growing area.
The conference is
Co-sponsored by
Nanjing University of 
				Science and Technology (NJUST) and IEEE, local organized by City University of Hong Kong 
				(CityU) and IEEE,  patrons Nanyang Technological 
				University (NTU), Samara University,  Nanjing University of 
				Aeronautics and Astronautics, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation 
				Engineering (AAE) of The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 
				(PolyU), York University, Bauman Moscow State Technical 
				University(BMSTU) and etc.
T
he regular program made up of 
				hundreds of submitted papers, we are going to highlight and 
				discuss topics
on
aerospace and astronautics in a number of formats like keynote 
				presentations, invited lectures, panel discussions
and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of 
				aerospace and astronautics and their applications.
We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to 
				meet with colleagues and friends. See you in
Hongkong
!
Thank you again.
Publication
Submissions will be peer-reviewed and evaluated based on 
			originality, relevance to conference, contributions, and 
			presentation. Accepted full papers will be collected in AAAC 
			Conference Proceedings, included in
IEEE Xplore
and
indexed by EI Compendex and SCOPUS, etc.
Submission
Paper submissions include FULL PAPER as well as 
				presentation-only Abstract submissions.
Please make the submission before the 
				deadline
May 20
, 2026
.
Presentation & Publication (Full paper) (
Template 
					Download
)
FULL PAPER submissions are from 4 full pages to 10 pages, and 
					the accepted paper is to be published.
Presentation Only (Abstract)  (
Template 
					Download
)
If you just want to make presentation without paper 
					publication, then you can only submit an abstract. The 
					abstracts are 350 words or less.
Submit Now
Attending without submission, you're welcome to register 
					as Listener (
Register 
					Now
)
Important Dates
Submission Deadline: 
			May 20, 2026
Notification Deadline: June 20, 2026
Registration Deadline:
July 10, 2026
Co-Sponsored by
Local Organizer
Patrons

Link: Venue
Title: AAAC 2026-The 3rd Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
AAAC 2026-The 3rd Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
Skip to main content
Venue
City University of Hong Kong (CityU)
Address: Tat Chee Avenue
Kowloon, Hong Kong
Web:
https://www.cityu.edu.hk/
Uniquely located in the heart of Hong Kong -- Asia's world city, CityUHK is an innovative hub for world-class research and education. We have 10 Colleges and Schools: Business, Engineering, Liberal Arts and Social Sciences, Science, Veterinary Medicine and Life Sciences, Creative Media, Data Science, Energy and Environment, Law, and Graduate Studies, together with 28 academic units. We nurture tomorrowâs global leaders through Inspirational Learning, Interactive Learning and Innovative Learning.
At CityUHK, we spark a passion that self-motivates our students to learn, help them work and learn within a team, and expose them to explore beyond academic boundaries and embrace inventions. Our students donât just get a degree from CityUHK, but receive a wonderful education here.
Not just for our faculty but more so for our students, we need to encourage and even incentivise research that results in scientific, technological or social impact. We cannot do research in everything, but CityUHK will help whatever research we do have a higher batting average in translating into economic or social use.
CityUHK is a globally connected university. We actively engage with the local communities, transform challenges into opportunities, and lead in redefining the role of universities for a future world. We have the noble task of preparing Hong Kongâs young people â as well as others who join us â to be ready and full of hope for their tomorrow.

Link: Visa and Invitation
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Visa and Invitation
Visa-Free Transit Policies for Foreign Nationals (24/72/144-hour)
1ã24-hour visa-free transit policy
China has implemented a 24-hour visa-free transit policy for 
				foreign nationals from
all other countries
around the 
				world at
all its accessible exit-entry ports
.
Foreign nationals holding
validâinternational travel 
				documents
and
connecting tickets with confirmed seats
, 
				who intend to transit viaâChina by international flights, ships, 
				or trains to third countries or regions, are exempt from visa 
				applications, provided that their
stay periods in China will 
				not exceed 24 hours and that they will remain within 
				theâcorresponding ports
. Those who plan to leave the ports 
				must apply for temporary entry permits at the exit-entry border 
				inspectionâauthorities of the corresponding ports.
2ã72-hour or 144-hourâvisa-free transit policy
Currently,
41âexit-entry ports
â(Pleaseâseeâtheâattachedâpicturesâbelow)âin
19
provinces, autonomous regions and municipalities 
				directly under the Central Government of China haveâimplemented 
				the 72-hour or 144-hour visa-free transit policy for foreign 
				nationals from 54 countries.
54 countries:â
Albania,âArgentina,âAustralia, Austria, 
				Belarus,âBelgium,âBosnia and Herzegovina, Brazil, 
				Brunei,âBulgaria,âCanada, Chile,âCroatia, Cyprus,âCzech 
				Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, 
				Greece,âHungary, Iceland, lreland, ltaly, Japan, Latvia, 
				Lithuania,âLuxembourg,âMalta, Mexico, Monaco, Montenegro,âthe 
				Netherlands, New Zealand, North Macedonia, Norway, Poland, 
				Portugal, Qatar,âthe Republic of Korea,âRomania, Russia, 
				Serbia,âSingapore, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain,âSweden, 
				Switzerland, Ukraine, the United Arab Emirates, the United 
				Kingdom, and the United States.
Please get more information here:
http://us.china-embassy.gov.cn/eng/lsfw/zj/qz2021/202407/t20240705_11449052.htm
Invitation Letters
The invitation letter will be issued after the 
					successful registration.
Your name must be listed exactly as it appears on your 
					passport. Any differences between the name on your passport 
					and the name on your invitation letter or other 
					documentation could lead to a delay and/or denial of your 
					visa.
Please note AAAC Conferences and the organizing 
					committee of the conference are not authorized to assist 
					with the VISA process beyond providing the Notification of 
					Invitation Letter issued by AAAC Conferences and conference 
					Committee Board. Should your application be denied, AAAC 
					Conferences and the organizing committee of the conference 
					cannot change the decision of the Ministry of Foreign 
					Affairs, nor will AAAC Conferences and the organizing 
					committee of the conference engage in discussion or 
					correspondence with the MOFA or the Embassy on behalf of the 
					applicant. The registration fee cannot be refunded when the 
					VISA application of individual being denied.
It takes around one month for the Embassy to process the 
					VISA application, please register as early as you can to 
					make sure you have enough time.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/review.html ===
Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/Registrationguide.html ===
Link: Registration Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Registration Guideline
Notifications
For one full paper, the first SIX pages are free. Extra 
					page will be charged.
Required documents: Please send your Final Paper (.doc and 
				.pdf) and Copyright to
aaac_conference@163.com
to finish the registration.
One regular registration allows one author to 
					participate in the conference. The others who plan to attend 
					the conference is required to register as listener.
Onsite Registration is for delegates only.
Pay attention !!
After you submitted all materials and finished registration 
					process, your paper will be submitted to editors for 
					re-modification and publication. If there are any problems, 
					the conference secretary will mail or call you soon. Please 
					check your mailbox usually and keep your cellphone 
					available. If you cannot amend paper and feed back modified 
					one before the deadline, publication will be cancelled 
					without any refund.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
Refund/Cancellation Policy
If a registrant is unable to attend an event for any reason, 
				they may ask the co-author or someone else for help and do the 
				presentation for the registrant. But the registrant should send 
				e-mail for both conference side and the person who will attend.
Written requests for cancellations must be sent to the AAAC 
				Conference Secretary. The time would be counted by the refund 
				requests being sent by registrant.
Three Months before conference date: 30USD handing fee 
					would be charged
Two Months before conference date: Refundment of 70% for 
					the registration fee you paid
One Month before conference date: Refundment of 50% for 
					the registration fee you paid
Less Than One Month before conference date: NO REFUND.
Personal Reason
No refund or compensation on âpersonal reasonâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference. Such as travel 
				difficulties, visa problems, health issues, financial default 
				etc.
Force Majeure
No refund or pay any compensation on âforce majeureâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference.
Circumstances amounting to âforce majeureâ include any event 
				which we could not, even with all due care, foresee or avoid. 
				Such circumstances include the fire, flood, explosion, storm or 
				other weather damage, break-in, criminal damage, riots or civil 
				strife, industrial action, natural or nuclear disaster, fire, 
				adverse weather conditions, war or threat of war, actual or 
				threatened terrorist activity, epidemic and all similar 
				situations beyond our control.
Warm Tips
Wearing your name tag when you enter the meeting room.
Please keep all your belongings with you in the public 
					including meeting room.
Conference organization is not responsible for the loss 
					or damage of any valuables of the attendees.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/presentation.html ===
Link: Presentation Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Presentation Guideline
Presentation Tips
The following arrangement is for your reference only. In case 
				of any absence or some presentation less than 15 minutes, please 
				come before your session starts.
*One best presentation will be selected from each session. 
				Announced and awarded the excellent presentation certificate at 
				the banquet.
Oral Presentation
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
You can use USB flash drive (memory stick), make sure 
					you scanned viruses in your own computer. Each speaker is 
					required to meet her / his session chair in the 
					corresponding session rooms 10 minutes before the session 
					starts and copy the slide file (PPT or PDF) to the computer.
It is suggested that you email a copy of your 
					presentation to your personal in box as a backup. If for 
					some reason the files canât be accessed from your flash 
					drive, you will be able to download them to the computer 
					from your email.
Please note that each session room will be equipped with 
					a LCD projector, screen, point device, microphone, and a 
					laptop with general presentation software such as Microsoft 
					Power Point and Adobe Reader. Please make sure that your 
					files are compatible and readable with our operation system 
					by using commonly used fronts and symbols. If you plan to 
					use your own computer, please try the connection and make 
					sure it works before your presentation.
Movies: If your Power Point files contain movies, please 
					make sure that they are well formatted and connected to the 
					main files.
Online Presentation
The whole conference will utilize Zoom video 
					conferencing.
You could locate the session which you plan to attend 
					and click on the âZoom linkâ, no password;
Install Zoom App on your computer, âJoin a Meetingâ by 
					inserting the meeting room ID. (download from zoom.us or 
					zoom.com.cn)
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
Please prepare:
Â· Computer with working camera and audio system;
Â· Stable Internet Connection (wired connection is 
					preferable);
Â· Quite place with proper lighting;
Â· Unnecessary applications are shut down on your computer so 
					all resources are allocated to the Zoom Meeting;
Â· Rename yourself with Session Number +Paper ID+Name, (eg. 
					S1+E001+Lily LI), before entering meeting room.
Â· Enter 15 Mins prior to your session in ZOOM, you cannot 
					connect the meeting until âhostâ starts it.
Please follow the program for zoom details
Poster Presentation
Maximum poster size is 60cm (width)*80cm (height)
Posters are required to be condensed and attractive. The 
					characters should be large enough so that they are visible 
					from 1 meter apart.
Please note that during your poster session, the author 
					should stay by your poster paper to explain and discuss your 
					paper with visiting delegates.
Dress Code
Please wearing formal clothes or ethnic clothing

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/topics.html ===
Link: Call for Papers
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Call for Papers
AAAC 2026 is the premier international forum for power 
				electronics and energy management researchers to present and 
				discuss their work. The conference will include 
				keynote presentation sessions, invited lectures, panel discussions and posters. Topics of interest include, but are not limited to the followingï¼
TRACK 1: Air Transportation
Air Traffic Planning and Management
Airspace Planning and Route Network Optimization
Air Traffic Information and Control
Air Traffic Safety and Environment
Air Traffic Big Data and Artificial Intelligence
TRACK
2
: Aerospace and Electronics Systems
Avionics monitoring and 
					maintenance, sensors and actuators
Circuit analysis, analog and 
					digital circuits, circuits and systems
High-frequency electronic 
					technology, electronic measurement technology
Research and Design of Aerospace 
					Electronic Information System
Electromagnetic field and 
					microwave technology, vacuum electronic technology
Optoelectronics in Aerospace 
					Applications, optical sensors for Aerospace Systems
Photonics Integration in 
					Avionics, optical communication systems in space, optical 
					signal processing in Aerospace Electronics
TRACK 3: Navigation and Spatial Communications
Aircraft navigation and 
					positioning technology, radar detection and imaging 
					technology
Synthetic aperture radar 
					technology, navigation guidance and control
UAV and remote sensing 
					technology, wireless communication and signal processing
Space-Earth Integration Network
Optical Navigation Systems for 
					Aircraft, Lidar Technology for Navigation and Imaging
Optical Satellite Communication 
					Systems, Optical Remote Sensing for UAVs
Optical Interference Techniques 
					in Spatial Communications
TRACK 4: Aerospace Science and Technology
Aerospace manufacturing 
					engineering, Emerging avionics technology, Aerospace 
					Propulsion
Spacecraft Structure and Design, 
					Aerospace Design, Testing, and Performance
Experimental Methods and 
					Measurements, Optical Metrology in Aerospace Manufacturing
Hyperspectral Imaging for 
					Aerospace Applications, Optical Coatings for Spacecraft 
					Structures
Laser Propulsion Systems for 
					Aerospace Vehicles
TRACK 5: Automatic Control Systems
Automation system engineering, 
					pattern recognition and intelligent system
Automation equipment and 
					systems, intelligent control technology and application
Application of automation 
					control technology in the aerospace field, monitoring 
					systems
TRACK
6
: Combustion and Propulsion
Combustion Analysis
Fuels / Fuel Injection
Engines
Turbines
Cooling Systems
Spacecraft Propulsion
Aerospace Propulsion Theory and Engineering
Track 7: Aerospace Manufacturing
Air Vehicle Airworthiness Technology
Air Vehicle Design
Man-Machine and Environmental Engineering
Advanced Materials Applications
Complex Systems Assembly
Track 8: Low Altitude Economy
Low Altitude Vehicle Design
Low Altitude Intelligent Network
Convergence of Low Altitude Application Scenarios

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/submission.html ===
Link: Submission
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Submission Guideline
AAAC 2026 is the  premier international forum for power 
				electronics and energy management researchers to present and 
				discuss their work. The conference will include 
				keynote presentation sessions, invited lectures, panel 
				discussions and posters. Please following the submission 
				guideline below:
Contributed Papers
The page limit for each submission is flexible. However, the 
				paper material (including text, figures, tables, 
				reference, acknowledgement, etc.) must fit at least 4 full pages 
				to 10 pages, while author information is excluded and will not be 
published. 
				Papers exceeding the 10 page limit at the time of submission 
				will be returned without review. Template is available below.
Template Download
Papers to AAAC can be submitted through the channel:
AAAC 2026 Submission Linkage
An account should be registered before the submission, if 
				you do not have one before. All papers are to be submitted in 
				PDF format.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.
Tutorials and Workshops
Tutorials and 
				workshops will be held on Aug 22 afternoon before the 
				conference technical sessions days. Tutorials will be invited. 
				Workshops provide an informal forum for participants to discuss 
				emerging and active research areas and proposals are called for. 
				Follow detailed instructions for submissions of workshops and 
				tutorials.
Title of the tutorial/workshop
General information of organizers (mail address of main 
					contact person, biodata)
Brief description of tutorial/workshop
Scope and topics of the workshop
Please send your proposal to
aaac_conference@163.com
.
Abstracts-Presentation Only
Make presentation without publication, please submit an abstract only. The abstracts are 350 words or less.
Template Download
Abstract to AAAC can be submitted through the channel:
AAAC 2026 Submission Linkage
An account should be registered before the submission, if 
				you do not have one before. All papers are to be submitted in 
				PDF format.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/awards.html ===
Link: Awards
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Awards
Best Paper Award
All nominations will be selected during the review 
					process and grouped into a few key areas.
Nominated papers in the same key area will be presented in 
				the same session.
Only full paper submissions which are presented at the 
					conference will be eligible for the best paper award.
Best Student Paper Award
The first author of the paper should be a registered 
					university student.
Only full papers submissions which are presented at the 
					conference will be considered.
Outstanding Reviewer Award
Outstanding Reviewer Award is presented to individuals who have demonstrated exceptional dedication and expertise in reviewing submissions for the conference. These individuals have provided insightful and constructive feedback, contributing to the overall quality of the conference proceedings.
Outstanding Organizing Award
Outstanding Contribution Award is given to an special session chairs who has made a significant contribution to the AAAC 2026.
Best Oral Presentation Award
For every session, one best oral presentation will be 
					selected by session chairs according to the originality, 
					applicability, Technical Merit, PPT and English.
Poster Presentation
All the accepted and resisted poster papers.
It will be selected by poster session chairs.

Welcome to 
	AAAC 2026
Dear AAAC attendees,
2026 4th Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
				(AAAC)
will take 
				place
in Hongkong, China
from
August 
				21-23, 2026
,
where
participants will gain detailed insights into the state of the art of aerospace and astronautics, and enjoy the exchange with other enthusiasts from all over the world who are interested in this highly relevant and constantly growing area.
The conference is
Co-sponsored by
Nanjing University of 
				Science and Technology (NJUST) and IEEE, local organized by City University of Hong Kong 
				(CityU) and IEEE,  patrons Nanyang Technological 
				University (NTU), Samara University,  Nanjing University of 
				Aeronautics and Astronautics, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation 
				Engineering (AAE) of The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 
				(PolyU), York University, Bauman Moscow State Technical 
				University(BMSTU) and etc.
T
he regular program made up of 
				hundreds of submitted papers, we are going to highlight and 
				discuss topics
on
aerospace and astronautics in a number of formats like keynote 
				presentations, invited lectures, panel discussions
and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of 
				aerospace and astronautics and their applications.
We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to 
				meet with colleagues and friends. See you in
Hongkong
!
Thank you again.
Publication
Submissions will be peer-reviewed and evaluated based on 
			originality, relevance to conference, contributions, and 
			presentation. Accepted full papers will be collected in AAAC 
			Conference Proceedings, included in
IEEE Xplore
and
indexed by EI Compendex and SCOPUS, etc.
Submission
Paper submissions include FULL PAPER as well as 
				presentation-only Abstract submissions.
Please make the submission before the 
				deadline
May 20
, 2026
.
Presentation & Publication (Full paper) (
Template 
					Download
)
FULL PAPER submissions are from 4 full pages to 10 pages, and 
					the accepted paper is to be published.
Presentation Only (Abstract)  (
Template 
					Download
)
If you just want to make presentation without paper 
					publication, then you can only submit an abstract. The 
					abstracts are 350 words or less.

Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/review.html ===
Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

					university student.
Only full papers submissions which are presented at the 
					conference will be considered.
Outstanding Reviewer Award
Outstanding Reviewer Award is presented to individuals who have demonstrated exceptional dedication and expertise in reviewing submissions for the conference. These individuals have provided insightful and constructive feedback, contributing to the overall quality of the conference proceedings.
Outstanding Organizing Award
Outstanding Contribution Award is given to an special session chairs who has made a significant contribution to the AAAC 2026.
Best Oral Presentation Award
For every session, one best oral presentation will be 
					selected by session chairs according to the originality, 
					applicability, Technical Merit, PPT and English.
Poster Presentation
All the accepted and resisted poster papers.
It will be selected by poster session chairs.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/Registrationguide.html ===
Link: Registration Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Registration Guideline
Notifications
For one full paper, the first SIX pages are free. Extra 
					page will be charged.
Required documents: Please send your Final Paper (.doc and 
				.pdf) and Copyright to
aaac_conference@163.com
to finish the registration.
One regular registration allows one author to 
					participate in the conference. The others who plan to attend 
					the conference is required to register as listener.
Onsite Registration is for delegates only.
Pay attention !!
After you submitted all materials and finished registration 
					process, your paper will be submitted to editors for 
					re-modification and publication. If there are any problems, 
					the conference secretary will mail or call you soon. Please 
					check your mailbox usually and keep your cellphone 
					available. If you cannot amend paper and feed back modified 
					one before the deadline, publication will be cancelled 
					without any refund.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
Refund/Cancellation Policy
If a registrant is unable to attend an event for any reason, 
				they may ask the co-author or someone else for help and do the 
				presentation for the registrant. But the registrant should send 
				e-mail for both conference side and the person who will attend.
Written requests for cancellations must be sent to the AAAC 
				Conference Secretary. The time would be counted by the refund 
				requests being sent by registrant.
Three Months before conference date: 30USD handing fee 
					would be charged
Two Months before conference date: Refundment of 70% for 
					the registration fee you paid
One Month before conference date: Refundment of 50% for 
					the registration fee you paid
Less Than One Month before conference date: NO REFUND.
Personal Reason
No refund or compensation on âpersonal reasonâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference. Such as travel 
				difficulties, visa problems, health issues, financial default 
				etc.
Force Majeure
No refund or pay any compensation on âforce majeureâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference.
Circumstances amounting to âforce majeureâ include any event 
				which we could not, even with all due care, foresee or avoid. 
				Such circumstances include the fire, flood, explosion, storm or 
				other weather damage, break-in, criminal damage, riots or civil 
				strife, industrial action, natural or nuclear disaster, fire, 
				adverse weather conditions, war or threat of war, actual or 
				threatened terrorist activity, epidemic and all similar 
				situations beyond our control.
Warm Tips
Wearing your name tag when you enter the meeting room.
Please keep all your belongings with you in the public 
					including meeting room.
Conference organization is not responsible for the loss 
					or damage of any valuables of the attendees.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

Link: Presentation Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Presentation Guideline
Presentation Tips
The following arrangement is for your reference only. In case 
				of any absence or some presentation less than 15 minutes, please 
				come before your session starts.
*One best presentation will be selected from each session. 
				Announced and awarded the excellent presentation certificate at 
				the banquet.
Oral Presentation
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
You can use USB flash drive (memory stick), make sure 
					you scanned viruses in your own computer. Each speaker is 
					required to meet her / his session chair in the 
					corresponding session rooms 10 minutes before the session 
					starts and copy the slide file (PPT or PDF) to the computer.
It is suggested that you email a copy of your 
					presentation to your personal in box as a backup. If for 
					some reason the files canât be accessed from your flash 
					drive, you will be able to download them to the computer 
					from your email.
Please note that each session room will be equipped with 
					a LCD projector, screen, point device, microphone, and a 
					laptop with general presentation software such as Microsoft 
					Power Point and Adobe Reader. Please make sure that your 
					files are compatible and readable with our operation system 
					by using commonly used fronts and symbols. If you plan to 
					use your own computer, please try the connection and make 
					sure it works before your presentation.
Movies: If your Power Point files contain movies, please 
					make sure that they are well formatted and connected to the 
					main files.
Online Presentation
The whole conference will utilize Zoom video 
					conferencing.
You could locate the session which you plan to attend 
					and click on the âZoom linkâ, no password;
Install Zoom App on your computer, âJoin a Meetingâ by 
					inserting the meeting room ID. (download from zoom.us or 
					zoom.com.cn)
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
Please prepare:
Â· Computer with working camera and audio system;
Â· Stable Internet Connection (wired connection is 
					preferable);
Â· Quite place with proper lighting;
Â· Unnecessary applications are shut down on your computer so 
					all resources are allocated to the Zoom Meeting;
Â· Rename yourself with Session Number +Paper ID+Name, (eg. 
					S1+E001+Lily LI), before entering meeting room.
Â· Enter 15 Mins prior to your session in ZOOM, you cannot 
					connect the meeting until âhostâ starts it.
Please follow the program for zoom details
Poster Presentation
Maximum poster size is 60cm (width)*80cm (height)
Posters are required to be condensed and attractive. The 
					characters should be large enough so that they are visible 
					from 1 meter apart.
Please note that during your poster session, the author 
					should stay by your poster paper to explain and discuss your 
					paper with visiting delegates.
Dress Code
Please wearing formal clothes or ethnic clothing

We nurture tomorrowâs global leaders through Inspirational Learning, Interactive Learning and Innovative Learning.
At CityUHK, we spark a passion that self-motivates our students to learn, help them work and learn within a team, and expose them to explore beyond academic boundaries and embrace inventions. Our students donât just get a degree from CityUHK, but receive a wonderful education here.
Not just for our faculty but more so for our students, we need to encourage and even incentivise research that results in scientific, technological or social impact. We cannot do research in everything, but CityUHK will help whatever research we do have a higher batting average in translating into economic or social use.
CityUHK is a globally connected university. We actively engage with the local communities, transform challenges into opportunities, and lead in redefining the role of universities for a future world. We have the noble task of preparing Hong Kongâs young people â as well as others who join us â to be ready and full of hope for their tomorrow.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/index.html ===
Link: Home
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Welcome to 
	AAAC 2026
Dear AAAC attendees,
2026 4th Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
				(AAAC)
will take 
				place
in Hongkong, China
from
August 
				21-23, 2026
,
where
participants will gain detailed insights into the state of the art of aerospace and astronautics, and enjoy the exchange with other enthusiasts from all over the world who are interested in this highly relevant and constantly growing area.
The conference is
Co-sponsored by
Nanjing University of 
				Science and Technology (NJUST) and IEEE, local organized by City University of Hong Kong 
				(CityU) and IEEE,  patrons Nanyang Technological 
				University (NTU), Samara University,  Nanjing University of 
				Aeronautics and Astronautics, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation 
				Engineering (AAE) of The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 
				(PolyU), York University, Bauman Moscow State Technical 
				University(BMSTU) and etc.
T
he regular program made up of 
				hundreds of submitted papers, we are going to highlight and 
				discuss topics
on
aerospace and astronautics in a number of formats like keynote 
				presentations, invited lectures, panel discussions
and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of 
				aerospace and astronautics and their applications.
We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to 
				meet with colleagues and friends. See you in
Hongkong
!
Thank you again.
Publication
Submissions will be peer-reviewed and evaluated based on 
			originality, relevance to conference, contributions, and 
			presentation. Accepted full papers will be collected in AAAC 
			Conference Proceedings, included in
IEEE Xplore
and
indexed by EI Compendex and SCOPUS, etc.
Submission
Paper submissions include FULL PAPER as well as 
				presentation-only Abstract submissions.
Please make the submission before the 
				deadline
May 20
, 2026
.
Presentation & Publication (Full paper) (
Template 
					Download
)
FULL PAPER submissions are from 4 full pages to 10 pages, and 
					the accepted paper is to be published.
Presentation Only (Abstract)  (
Template 
					Download
)
If you just want to make presentation without paper 
					publication, then you can only submit an abstract. The 
					abstracts are 350 words or less.
Submit Now
Attending without submission, you're welcome to register 
					as Listener (
Register 
					Now
)
Important Dates
Submission Deadline: 
			May 20, 2026
Notification Deadline: June 20, 2026
Registration Deadline:
July 10, 2026
Co-Sponsored by
Local Organizer

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/review.html ===
Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

Presentation Guideline
Presentation Tips
The following arrangement is for your reference only. In case 
				of any absence or some presentation less than 15 minutes, please 
				come before your session starts.
*One best presentation will be selected from each session. 
				Announced and awarded the excellent presentation certificate at 
				the banquet.
Oral Presentation
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
You can use USB flash drive (memory stick), make sure 
					you scanned viruses in your own computer. Each speaker is 
					required to meet her / his session chair in the 
					corresponding session rooms 10 minutes before the session 
					starts and copy the slide file (PPT or PDF) to the computer.
It is suggested that you email a copy of your 
					presentation to your personal in box as a backup. If for 
					some reason the files canât be accessed from your flash 
					drive, you will be able to download them to the computer 
					from your email.
Please note that each session room will be equipped with 
					a LCD projector, screen, point device, microphone, and a 
					laptop with general presentation software such as Microsoft 
					Power Point and Adobe Reader. Please make sure that your 
					files are compatible and readable with our operation system 
					by using commonly used fronts and symbols. If you plan to 
					use your own computer, please try the connection and make 
					sure it works before your presentation.
Movies: If your Power Point files contain movies, please 
					make sure that they are well formatted and connected to the 
					main files.
Online Presentation
The whole conference will utilize Zoom video 
					conferencing.
You could locate the session which you plan to attend 
					and click on the âZoom linkâ, no password;
Install Zoom App on your computer, âJoin a Meetingâ by 
					inserting the meeting room ID. (download from zoom.us or 
					zoom.com.cn)
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
Please prepare:
Â· Computer with working camera and audio system;
Â· Stable Internet Connection (wired connection is 
					preferable);
Â· Quite place with proper lighting;
Â· Unnecessary applications are shut down on your computer so 
					all resources are allocated to the Zoom Meeting;
Â· Rename yourself with Session Number +Paper ID+Name, (eg. 
					S1+E001+Lily LI), before entering meeting room.
Â· Enter 15 Mins prior to your session in ZOOM, you cannot 
					connect the meeting until âhostâ starts it.
Please follow the program for zoom details
Poster Presentation
Maximum poster size is 60cm (width)*80cm (height)
Posters are required to be condensed and attractive. The 
					characters should be large enough so that they are visible 
					from 1 meter apart.
Please note that during your poster session, the author 
					should stay by your poster paper to explain and discuss your 
					paper with visiting delegates.

Please wearing formal clothes or ethnic clothing

he regular program made up of

on

and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of

We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to

Submission Guideline
AAAC 2026 is the  premier international forum for power 
				electronics and energy management researchers to present and 
				discuss their work. The conference will include 
				keynote presentation sessions, invited lectures, panel 
				discussions and posters. Please following the submission 
				guideline below:
Contributed Papers
The page limit for each submission is flexible. However, the 
				paper material (including text, figures, tables, 
				reference, acknowledgement, etc.) must fit at least 4 full pages 
				to 10 pages, while author information is excluded and will not be 
published. 
				Papers exceeding the 10 page limit at the time of submission 
				will be returned without review. Template is available below.

Tutorials and Workshops
Tutorials and

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/review.html ===
Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

Link: Presentation Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Presentation Guideline
Presentation Tips
The following arrangement is for your reference only. In case 
				of any absence or some presentation less than 15 minutes, please 
				come before your session starts.
*One best presentation will be selected from each session. 
				Announced and awarded the excellent presentation certificate at 
				the banquet.
Oral Presentation
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
You can use USB flash drive (memory stick), make sure 
					you scanned viruses in your own computer. Each speaker is 
					required to meet her / his session chair in the 
					corresponding session rooms 10 minutes before the session 
					starts and copy the slide file (PPT or PDF) to the computer.
It is suggested that you email a copy of your 
					presentation to your personal in box as a backup. If for 
					some reason the files canât be accessed from your flash 
					drive, you will be able to download them to the computer 
					from your email.
Please note that each session room will be equipped with 
					a LCD projector, screen, point device, microphone, and a 
					laptop with general presentation software such as Microsoft 
					Power Point and Adobe Reader. Please make sure that your 
					files are compatible and readable with our operation system 
					by using commonly used fronts and symbols. If you plan to 
					use your own computer, please try the connection and make 
					sure it works before your presentation.
Movies: If your Power Point files contain movies, please 
					make sure that they are well formatted and connected to the 
					main files.
Online Presentation
The whole conference will utilize Zoom video 
					conferencing.
You could locate the session which you plan to attend 
					and click on the âZoom linkâ, no password;
Install Zoom App on your computer, âJoin a Meetingâ by 
					inserting the meeting room ID. (download from zoom.us or 
					zoom.com.cn)
Timing: a maximum of 15 minutes total, including 
					presentation and Q&A . Please make sure your presentation is 
					well timed. Please keep in mind that the program is fully 
					scheduled and that the speaker after you would like their 
					allocated time available to them.
Please prepare:
Â· Computer with working camera and audio system;
Â· Stable Internet Connection (wired connection is 
					preferable);
Â· Quite place with proper lighting;
Â· Unnecessary applications are shut down on your computer so 
					all resources are allocated to the Zoom Meeting;
Â· Rename yourself with Session Number +Paper ID+Name, (eg. 
					S1+E001+Lily LI), before entering meeting room.
Â· Enter 15 Mins prior to your session in ZOOM, you cannot 
					connect the meeting until âhostâ starts it.
Please follow the program for zoom details
Poster Presentation
Maximum poster size is 60cm (width)*80cm (height)
Posters are required to be condensed and attractive. The 
					characters should be large enough so that they are visible 
					from 1 meter apart.
Please note that during your poster session, the author 
					should stay by your poster paper to explain and discuss your 
					paper with visiting delegates.
Dress Code
Please wearing formal clothes or ethnic clothing

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/Registrationguide.html ===
Link: Registration Guideline
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Registration Guideline
Notifications
For one full paper, the first SIX pages are free. Extra 
					page will be charged.
Required documents: Please send your Final Paper (.doc and 
				.pdf) and Copyright to
aaac_conference@163.com
to finish the registration.
One regular registration allows one author to 
					participate in the conference. The others who plan to attend 
					the conference is required to register as listener.
Onsite Registration is for delegates only.
Pay attention !!
After you submitted all materials and finished registration 
					process, your paper will be submitted to editors for 
					re-modification and publication. If there are any problems, 
					the conference secretary will mail or call you soon. Please 
					check your mailbox usually and keep your cellphone 
					available. If you cannot amend paper and feed back modified 
					one before the deadline, publication will be cancelled 
					without any refund.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
Refund/Cancellation Policy
If a registrant is unable to attend an event for any reason, 
				they may ask the co-author or someone else for help and do the 
				presentation for the registrant. But the registrant should send 
				e-mail for both conference side and the person who will attend.
Written requests for cancellations must be sent to the AAAC 
				Conference Secretary. The time would be counted by the refund 
				requests being sent by registrant.
Three Months before conference date: 30USD handing fee 
					would be charged
Two Months before conference date: Refundment of 70% for 
					the registration fee you paid
One Month before conference date: Refundment of 50% for 
					the registration fee you paid
Less Than One Month before conference date: NO REFUND.
Personal Reason
No refund or compensation on âpersonal reasonâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference. Such as travel 
				difficulties, visa problems, health issues, financial default 
				etc.
Force Majeure
No refund or pay any compensation on âforce majeureâ for the 
				reason of no attending to the conference.
Circumstances amounting to âforce majeureâ include any event 
				which we could not, even with all due care, foresee or avoid. 
				Such circumstances include the fire, flood, explosion, storm or 
				other weather damage, break-in, criminal damage, riots or civil 
				strife, industrial action, natural or nuclear disaster, fire, 
				adverse weather conditions, war or threat of war, actual or 
				threatened terrorist activity, epidemic and all similar 
				situations beyond our control.
Warm Tips
Wearing your name tag when you enter the meeting room.
Please keep all your belongings with you in the public 
					including meeting room.
Conference organization is not responsible for the loss 
					or damage of any valuables of the attendees.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/awards.html ===
Link: Awards
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Awards
Best Paper Award
All nominations will be selected during the review 
					process and grouped into a few key areas.
Nominated papers in the same key area will be presented in 
				the same session.
Only full paper submissions which are presented at the 
					conference will be eligible for the best paper award.
Best Student Paper Award
The first author of the paper should be a registered 
					university student.
Only full papers submissions which are presented at the 
					conference will be considered.
Outstanding Reviewer Award
Outstanding Reviewer Award is presented to individuals who have demonstrated exceptional dedication and expertise in reviewing submissions for the conference. These individuals have provided insightful and constructive feedback, contributing to the overall quality of the conference proceedings.
Outstanding Organizing Award
Outstanding Contribution Award is given to an special session chairs who has made a significant contribution to the AAAC 2026.
Best Oral Presentation Award
For every session, one best oral presentation will be 
					selected by session chairs according to the originality, 
					applicability, Technical Merit, PPT and English.
Poster Presentation
All the accepted and resisted poster papers.
It will be selected by poster session chairs.

We nurture tomorrowâs global leaders through Inspirational Learning, Interactive Learning and Innovative Learning.
At CityUHK, we spark a passion that self-motivates our students to learn, help them work and learn within a team, and expose them to explore beyond academic boundaries and embrace inventions. Our students donât just get a degree from CityUHK, but receive a wonderful education here.
Not just for our faculty but more so for our students, we need to encourage and even incentivise research that results in scientific, technological or social impact. We cannot do research in everything, but CityUHK will help whatever research we do have a higher batting average in translating into economic or social use.
CityUHK is a globally connected university. We actively engage with the local communities, transform challenges into opportunities, and lead in redefining the role of universities for a future world. We have the noble task of preparing Hong Kongâs young people â as well as others who join us â to be ready and full of hope for their tomorrow.

all other countries
around the

all its accessible exit-entry ports
.
Foreign nationals holding
validâinternational travel 
				documents
and
connecting tickets with confirmed seats
,

				or trains to third countries or regions, are exempt from visa 
				applications, provided that their
stay periods in China will 
				not exceed 24 hours and that they will remain within 
				theâcorresponding ports
. Those who plan to leave the ports

				inspectionâauthorities of the corresponding ports.

provinces, autonomous regions and municipalities

54 countries:â
Albania,âArgentina,âAustralia, Austria, 
				Belarus,âBelgium,âBosnia and Herzegovina, Brazil, 
				Brunei,âBulgaria,âCanada, Chile,âCroatia, Cyprus,âCzech 
				Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany,

Invitation Letters
The invitation letter will be issued after the 
					successful registration.
Your name must be listed exactly as it appears on your 
					passport. Any differences between the name on your passport 
					and the name on your invitation letter or other 
					documentation could lead to a delay and/or denial of your 
					visa.
Please note AAAC Conferences and the organizing 
					committee of the conference are not authorized to assist 
					with the VISA process beyond providing the Notification of 
					Invitation Letter issued by AAAC Conferences and conference 
					Committee Board. Should your application be denied, AAAC 
					Conferences and the organizing committee of the conference 
					cannot change the decision of the Ministry of Foreign 
					Affairs, nor will AAAC Conferences and the organizing 
					committee of the conference engage in discussion or 
					correspondence with the MOFA or the Embassy on behalf of the 
					applicant. The registration fee cannot be refunded when the 
					VISA application of individual being denied.
It takes around one month for the Embassy to process the 
					VISA application, please register as early as you can to 
					make sure you have enough time.

Title: AAAC 2026

Welcome to 
	AAAC 2026
Dear AAAC attendees,
2026 4th Asian Aerospace and Astronautics Conference
				(AAAC)
will take 
				place
in Hongkong, China
from
August 
				21-23, 2026
,
where
participants will gain detailed insights into the state of the art of aerospace and astronautics, and enjoy the exchange with other enthusiasts from all over the world who are interested in this highly relevant and constantly growing area.
The conference is
Co-sponsored by
Nanjing University of 
				Science and Technology (NJUST) and IEEE, local organized by City University of Hong Kong 
				(CityU) and IEEE,  patrons Nanyang Technological 
				University (NTU), Samara University,  Nanjing University of 
				Aeronautics and Astronautics, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation 
				Engineering (AAE) of The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 
				(PolyU), York University, Bauman Moscow State Technical 
				University(BMSTU) and etc.
T
he regular program made up of 
				hundreds of submitted papers, we are going to highlight and 
				discuss topics
on
aerospace and astronautics in a number of formats like keynote 
				presentations, invited lectures, panel discussions
and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of 
				aerospace and astronautics and their applications.
We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to 
				meet with colleagues and friends. See you in
Hongkong
!
Thank you again.
Publication
Submissions will be peer-reviewed and evaluated based on 
			originality, relevance to conference, contributions, and 
			presentation. Accepted full papers will be collected in AAAC 
			Conference Proceedings, included in
IEEE Xplore
and
indexed by EI Compendex and SCOPUS, etc.
Submission
Paper submissions include FULL PAPER as well as 
				presentation-only Abstract submissions.
Please make the submission before the 
				deadline
May 20
, 2026
.

Template

)
FULL PAPER submissions are from 4 full pages to 10 pages, and

Template

)

					abstracts are 350 words or less.
Submit Now

Register

)

			May 20, 2026

				Aeronautics and Astronautics, Department of Aeronautical and Aviation 
				Engineering (AAE) of The Hong Kong Polytechnic University 
				(PolyU), York University, Bauman Moscow State Technical 
				University(BMSTU) and etc.
T
he regular program made up of 
				hundreds of submitted papers, we are going to highlight and 
				discuss topics
on
aerospace and astronautics in a number of formats like keynote 
				presentations, invited lectures, panel discussions
and posters
. On behalf of the organizing committee, we warmly invite you to take part in the conference. With your participation and contribution, together, we shall advance the state-of-the-art in the field of 
				aerospace and astronautics and their applications.
We hope that you will find this an attractive occasion to 
				meet with colleagues and friends. See you in
Hongkong
!
Thank you again.
Publication
Submissions will be peer-reviewed and evaluated based on 
			originality, relevance to conference, contributions, and 
			presentation. Accepted full papers will be collected in AAAC 
			Conference Proceedings, included in
IEEE Xplore
and
indexed by EI Compendex and SCOPUS, etc.
Submission
Paper submissions include FULL PAPER as well as 
				presentation-only Abstract submissions.
Please make the submission before the 
				deadline
May 20
, 2026
.
Presentation & Publication (Full paper) (
Template 
					Download
)
FULL PAPER submissions are from 4 full pages to 10 pages, and 
					the accepted paper is to be published.
Presentation Only (Abstract)  (
Template 
					Download
)
If you just want to make presentation without paper 
					publication, then you can only submit an abstract. The 
					abstracts are 350 words or less.
Submit Now
Attending without submission, you're welcome to register 
					as Listener (
Register 
					Now
)
Important Dates
Submission Deadline: 
			May 20, 2026
Notification Deadline: June 20, 2026
Registration Deadline:
July 10, 2026

Link: Call for Papers
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Call for Papers
AAAC 2026 is the premier international forum for power 
				electronics and energy management researchers to present and 
				discuss their work. The conference will include 
				keynote presentation sessions, invited lectures, panel discussions and posters. Topics of interest include, but are not limited to the followingï¼
TRACK 1: Air Transportation
Air Traffic Planning and Management
Airspace Planning and Route Network Optimization
Air Traffic Information and Control
Air Traffic Safety and Environment
Air Traffic Big Data and Artificial Intelligence
TRACK
2
: Aerospace and Electronics Systems
Avionics monitoring and 
					maintenance, sensors and actuators
Circuit analysis, analog and 
					digital circuits, circuits and systems

=== PAGE: https://aaac.net/review.html ===
Link: Review Process
Title: AAAC 2026
AAAC 2026
Skip to main content
Review Process
Important Information
Submit full paper or abstract to
Submission System
.
The selection panel of the conference committee will 
					consider all papers or abstract received by the submission 
					deadline to ensure that the proposed submission is relevant 
					to the Conference.
Abstract selection notifications will be sent out to 
				relevant authors within five working days
All papers will be double-blind peer reviewed by members 
					of the conference committee to ensure an adequate standard, 
					that the proposed subject of the submission has been 
					followed, that the paper is of a suitable length, the 
					standard of English is adequate and the paper is 
					appropriately referenced.
For authors whose first language is not English, we request 
				that you have your work proof-read prior to submission by a 
				native English speaker (or at least a fluent English speaker). 
				Papers can be rejected due to a poor standard of English.
Papers that are accepted will be published in the 
					conference proceedings providing at least one author 
					completes registration (including payment). see the 
					registration section of the conference website for more 
					information about registration. The conference proceedings 
					is a book published with an ISBN.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita 
					via
aaac_conference@163.com
General Requirements of Publication
Authors acknowledge that the paper has not been 
					previously published or accepted for publication in 
					substantially similar form in any peer-reviewed venue with 
					publicly accessible papers, including journals, conferences, 
					workshops, or other peer-reviewed, archival forums.
The AAAC submission should contain no more than 20 
					percent of material from previous publications. Violation of 
					any of these conditions will lead to rejection.
Submissions should be written in English with a minimum 
					paper length of 4 full pages and maximum 10 pages.
All figures, equations, reference should be clear and in 
					good order.
Manuscripts will be reviewed by appropriately qualified 
					experts in the field selected by the Conference Committee, 
					who will give detailed comments and â if the submission gets 
					accepted â the authors submit a revised ("camera-ready") 
					version that takes into account this feedback. The final 
					paper should be modified according to the review comments.
About Plagiarism
Plagiarism is totally unacceptable to AAAC. Submitted papers 
				are expected to contain original work executed by the authors 
				with adequate, proper and scholarly citations to the work of 
				others. The authors have to clearly identify both their own 
				contribution(s) and also published results / techniques on which 
				they depend or build. Reviewers are charged to ensure these 
				standards are met.
If the author is found to commit an act of plagiarism, the 
				following acts of sanction will be taken:
Reject the article submitted or delete the article from 
					the final publications.
Report the authors violation to his/her supervisor(s) 
					and affiliated institution(s)
Report the authors violation to the appropriate 
					overseeing office of academic ethics and research funding 
					agency.
Reserve the right to publish the authors name(s), the 
					title of the article, the name(s) of the affiliated 
					institution and the details of misconduct, etc. of the 
					plagiaristâ.
Any questions please mail conference secretary Rita via
aaac_conference@163.com
.

Presentation Tips
The following arrangement is for your reference only. In case

*One best presentation will be selected from each session. 
				Announced and awarded the excellent presentation certificate at
